title: OpenAI API returns 'invalid model ID' error
symptom: When sending a request to the OpenAI Chat Completions API, the response indicates 'invalid model ID'. This occurs despite having a valid messages array and JSON payload.
not_this_if: Model is changed to a known-good one like gpt-4o
OpenAI node is used with a valid model
root_cause: The error 'invalid model ID' suggests that the specified model (gpt-4.1) is not available for the endpoint or the API key being used. This can happen if the model is restricted to a different endpoint or if the account does not have access to that model.
fix_steps: Change the model to a known-good one like gpt-4o
Test the request again to see if it succeeds
If using the OpenAI node, check the model dropdown for available models
agent_instruction: Change the model to gpt-4o and retry the request.
